claim: No Stable, release, conformance, image safety, server lifecycle, package-parity, or recorded manual assistive-technology claim is made by this source contract.

semantics.nativeBasis: Mergora FileTrigger remains the one real file input; preview uses an ordinary named img and metadata uses a description list.
semantics.naming: Visible avatar context and native choose/replace labels remain distinct; enabled edit, remove, retry, and preview output have explicit names.
semantics.roleOverride: Consumer children, change, and native input type overrides are outside the supported contract.

interaction.keyboard: The native picker and every enabled action are standard focusable controls in document order.
interaction.pointer: Choose, replace, edit, remove, and retry use explicit controls without hidden gesture areas.
interaction.touch: Preferred-size controls remain usable on coarse pointers and no crop gesture is implemented by core.
interaction.speech: Visible choose/replace/edit/remove/retry labels provide deterministic voice targets.
interaction.switchAccess: No timed interaction, canvas-only crop, or drag-only replacement is required.

formBehavior: FileTrigger remains the one successful input. Initial/default and external controlled File values synchronize through the bounded shared FileList helper; selection, removal, required validation, disabled omission, FormData, and reset remain aligned without synthetic events. Failure clears and blocks the native value.

states.synchronization: Controlled and uncontrolled selected files share one reasoned callback; consumer status exclusively drives server lifecycle output.

preferences.enhancedContrast: Strong structural rules, labels, lifecycle text, and image boundary accompany color.
preferences.forcedColors: Canvas, CanvasText, ButtonFace, ButtonText, and Highlight retain controls, image boundary, and focus.
preferences.reducedMotion: Preview and lifecycle meaning do not depend on animation; transition duration is removed.

responsive.overflowPolicy: The visual/control split collapses to one column and names wrap at narrow widths.

internationalization.imePolicy: The component has no text-editing surface.
internationalization.serialization: The native input submits the user-selected File; preview URLs and metadata are never serialized.

consumerResponsibilities: Validate image signatures, dimensions, authorization, malware controls, and server policy before persistence.
Own crop UI, transport, credentials, replacement/removal authorization, retry, and durable lifecycle state.
Treat the visible form synchronization error as a blocked direct-form submission and preserve recovery.
Return a safe Blob from previewTransform and honor AbortSignal for expensive crop or decode work.
Provide localized recovery messages and meaningful preview alternative text for the product context.
limitations: Source-present-unreleased records do not include packed-consumer, package/source parity, real server lifecycle, crop adapter, or manual assistive-technology evidence.
Core AvatarUpload does not decode image dimensions, crop pixels, inspect metadata safety, upload, persist, replace, or delete server content.
Controlled/default native synchronization depends on standards-supported DataTransfer FileList assignment and fails closed when the browser cannot verify it.
